{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53719", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-476", "name": "NULL Pointer Dereference"}], "description": "Vulnerability report without repro case. Repro case may be added later after harness is complete.

**Preconditions (4):**
- Tenant has SecurityPolicy + TCPRoute RBAC (baseline)
- Tenant namespace permitted to attach TCPRoute to a Gateway listener
- spec.authorization omitted (the trigger)
- No admission webhook blocks the shape

**Description:**

A namespace-scoped tenant can deterministically panic the gatewayapi runner on every reconcile with a single CRD; the recover() in message/watchutil.go:53 keeps the process alive but unwinds the entire handle() callback in runner/runner.go:192, so xDS/Infra IR publishing stalls controller-wide until an admin deletes the object. Data plane keeps serving last-good config.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00121, "percentile": 0.30957}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-16T19:19:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53719"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-16T19:19:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/envoyproxy/gateway/security/advisories/GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/envoyproxy/gateway/security-advisories/GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/gateway", "summary": "Envoy Gateway: Nil-dereference when SecurityPolicy targets TCPRoute without spec.authorization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-16T19:19:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m2v6-2jmh-4c68", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/envoyproxy/gateway"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.8.0-rc.0, < 1.8.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.7.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/envoyproxy/gateway"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.7.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Envoy Gateway: Nil-dereference when SecurityPolicy targets TCPRoute without spec.authorization
